_doc: Sprouts Farmers Market gold-ladder thresholds. Merchant #2 of the ladder-green loop. Bands are inherited from costco.thresholds.json because the gated metrics are either ratios to the real reference (target 1.0: ink/cap/pitch/advance/caption) or dynamic (L0 fill + all L3 channels center on the harness-measured real value), so they transfer merchant-agnostically. Regions were re-derived from THIS receipt's real row-ink profile. The L1 iou_rc rung is chart-anchored and Sprouts has no specimen chart, so it is SKIPPED at runtime (dropped from the L1 gate; the block is kept for structural parity with costco). A Sprouts-specific band re-fit is future work.
_gold_note: The SPROUTS receipt in image 00ded398 is receipt #1 (receipt #2 in the same image is a Vons receipt). The committed pipeline/sprouts/final.labels.json is mis-tagged #2 but contains #1's Sprouts words.

hygiene._doc: Drop the SPROUTS wordmark lines (oversized display glyphs that break single-glyph segmentation). Sprouts-specific hygiene tuning (dense payment/footer blocks) is future work; the gated L0/L2 metrics do not use this mask.

L1._iou_re_doc: Chart-free L1 fallback rung: render->real IoU (dir=min) vs the Sprouts crops' own usage-weighted leave-one-out self-agreement (0.611, measured on sprouts.refpack in the harness's shifted-IoU space) -- the render->real 1:1 ceiling. Only gated for merchants with no specimen chart.

_L3_doc: L3 channels are evaluated against the harness-measured real value (dynamic band). 'target' is the documented Costco Part-1 reference echoed as spec_target; tol is the dynamic band half-width.
